title: compose-speed: clean cost-delta A/B on a 1-pass multi-item task
description: S3 proved the fan-out mechanism but the cost-delta number was muddied (test task referenced a non-existent clamp -> 3 iterations). Run a clean 2-3 item task where all items exist + implement in one pass to isolate the token/wall-clock delta vs the old serial shape.

title: poteau: exit-gate refusal cites flat .run/poteau/packet.json vs run-scoped carve-out
description: Live re-drive finding: exit-gate.sh refusal says 'emit to .run/poteau/packet.json' (flat) but the tool-gate mailbox carve-out only allows .run/poteau/<run_id>/packet.json (run-scoped). An agent following the refusal literally is denied (deadlock). Align the message with the carve-out or vice versa.

title: poteau: false-positive council arming — session armed to a run it never entered
description: Live re-drive finding: a read-only/recon session got armed (by-session pointer) to a council:true run it never ran a segment for, then deadlocked at the exit-gate. The dispatcher/by-session arming should not attach to a session that never entered a segment.

title: Fix: poteau gate forgeable — work agent self-mints valid poteau_gate_pass
poteau/laplas FR-E: sync vendored changes to loa-laplas upstream (CI red)
description: PR #44 commit ec4fd78: the loa-laplas 'poteau' CI workflow FAILS on the FR-E laplas tests (seeder armed-contract S2.1, #30 single-voice P204, S4.2 council-clears) — while construct-rooms-substrate's local laplas/test/*.test.mjs is 35/35 on the same commit. Root: poteau/+laplas/ are vendored from loa-laplas; the FR-E cryptographic-council changes (poteau-gatekeeper.mjs G4 signed receipts, reviewer-keys.mjs, seed-runstate.mjs provisioning, council-run.sh signing, run+gate binding, updated council.test.mjs) diverged the vendored copy from loa-laplas's upstream tests. Reconcile: land the FR-E code+test updates in loa-laplas (the source of truth) so its 'poteau' CI goes green. Until then PR #44's invariant-demo check stays red (non-required; required FR-B0 freeze-gate passes).
close_reason: Mis-framed as vendored divergence — the remote IS loa-laplas (same repo). Real cause: S1's council:false flip broke 4 laplas tests using the module as a council:true fixture + S2's dag_fanout key violated the composition schema. Reconciled: tests decoupled to explicit council:true contracts, dag_fanout demoted to a comment. Fresh CI-equivalent green (bats 94, laplas 35, demo 32).

S3.3 hardening: compose-resolve.mjs accept goal on stdin (avoid SKILL.md argv interpolation of untrusted goal)
description: Audit MEDIUM-1 (sprint-3): skills/compose/SKILL.md step 2.5 documents 'compose-resolve.mjs --goal <goal>', interpolating an untrusted goal into a shell command. No vulnerable code path (process.argv is safe), but executor string-interpolation is a breakout footgun. Add stdin goal input to compose-resolve.mjs + update SKILL.md to pipe the goal. Non-blocking.

S3 re-grounding spike (IMP-005): update SDD §3.3 clew mechanics — watchdog trigger is non-convergence/budget-exhaustion, not non-liveness
description: A-3 DISPROVEN at S1.4 (decisions.md): loiterer was fully live; livenessVerdict alone would not fire. Clew mechanics must add budget/convergence dimension (calls-ceiling-exceeded → watchdog clew). One-day spike, BLOCKS S3.4 closure. Evidence: obs-design-20260612 manifest calls_ceiling=2 vs actual 68.

S3.4 DEPENDENCY_FAILED stranding: rewrite emitter wave-failure loop (B7) + G-6 benchmark
description: Deferred from decompose-bridge Sprint 3 (operator decision 2026-06-13). The gate_batch_max config touch shipped (boundedParallel width = rel_policy.gate_batch_max). REMAINING: the emitter's DAG wave loop (segment-emitter.py ~line 1056-1083) currently fails the WHOLE dag on first wave failure; B7 wants a failed item to strand only its transitive DEPENDENTS (typed DEPENDENCY_FAILED) while independent batches still complete. High blast radius (every composition uses this loop); AC-S3.4 G-6 benchmark (gate wall-clock <= 25% of wave on a large DAG) is integration-only. Do in a focused session with a real integration run + keep tests/integration/form-c-dispatch.bats green.

title: compose-speed: auto-decompose tasks into args.items[] in the /compose driver
description: code-implement-and-review fan-out is opt-in: nothing auto-derives items[] (not the emitter, not the /compose skill). Make the driver decompose a task along independent file/module boundaries into args.items[] so fan-out is the default, not manual. See grimoires/loa/a2a/compose-speed-s2/reviewer.md + sprint-compose-speed.md.

title: poteau: no truthful agent-side verdict:aborted abort path
description: Live re-drive finding (#7 friction): an armed run has no honest agent-side exit — G2/P202 requires in_scope:true which an aborting agent cannot assert. Only operator break-glass or the loop-guard release. Add a sanctioned verdict:aborted packet shape that clears G1/G2 without faking council, so honest no-ops have a door.
